character.definition: to hold; to grasp; to seize, to retain
an arrow; a dart, asparagus fern
to repair shoes, the front part of a shoe, (same as 鞹) leather; hides with the hair removed
(same as 颿) to move fast; to hasten, a swift horse, (same as 帆) a sail (of a boat)
pole; stick; club; pole as unit
a key; to be in charge; a pipe
to run threads though a web in weaving
vehicles and garments (commonly used in feudal times to reward vassals), covering on the crossbar at the ends of carriage poles, crank axle of a shade
